summary: Completed comprehensive testing of user subscription management and promo code validity period features. All 21 backend API tests passed (100%). Admin panel UI verified via Playwright - Users page shows subscription info, expiration dates, and management modal with all 4 actions. Promos page displays validity period column with start/end dates and 'Pas encore valide' status for future codes.
seed_data_creation: TEST_SUBPROMO_ prefixed users and test promo codes created and cleaned up during tests. RAMADAN2026 promo code exists with start_date 2026-03-01.
context_for_next_testing_agent: User subscription management and promo code validity period features fully functional. Admin endpoints: /api/admin/users/{user_id}/grant-access, revoke-access, extend-subscription, grant-subscription all working. Promo codes support start_date and expires_at fields, validation returns appropriate errors for codes not yet valid or expired.

POST /api/admin/users/{user_id}/grant-ac.details: Grants free_access=true to user. Returns 404 for non-existent user.

POST /api/admin/users/{user_id}/revoke-a.details: Revokes all access (free_access, subscription, trial). Returns 404 for non-existent user.

POST /api/admin/users/{user_id}/extend-s.details: Extends subscription by specified days. Creates new subscription if none exists. Extends from current expiration if active.

POST /api/admin/users/{user_id}/grant-su.details: Grants monthly (30 days) or annual (365 days) subscription. Returns expires_at in response.

POST /api/admin/promo-codes (with start_.details: Creates promo code with start_date field. Field stored correctly in database.

POST /api/admin/promo-codes (with expire.details: Creates promo code with expires_at field. Field stored correctly in database.

POST /api/promo/validate (not yet valid).details: Returns 400 with 'Code promo pas encore valide' for codes with future start_date.

POST /api/promo/validate (expired).details: Returns 400 with 'Code promo expiré' for codes with past expires_at.

POST /api/promo/validate (active).details: Returns 200 with valid=true, discount info, start_date and expires_at fields.

RAMADAN2026 promo validation.details: Returns 400 'Code promo pas encore valide' as expected (start_date 2026-03-01).

Admin Panel Users Page.details: Shows users list with subscription badges (Annuel/Mensuel/Accès gratuit/Aucun), expiration dates with days remaining, and crown icon action button.

Admin Panel Subscription Modal.details: Modal with 4 actions: Prolonger l'abonnement, Accorder un abonnement, Accorder accès gratuit permanent, Révoquer l'accès. Shows user email, current status, and expiration.

Admin Panel Promos Page.details: Shows 'Période de validité' column with date ranges (e.g., '01/03/2026 → 31/03/2026'). Status badges show 'Actif', 'Pas encore valide', 'Expiré' based on validity period.

Admin Panel Promo Create Modal.details: Modal includes 'Date de début' and 'Date d'expiration' date picker fields with helper text explaining their purpose.

ui_verifications.users_page_table: ✅ Shows UTILISATEUR, ROLE, ABONNEMENT, EXPIRATION, INSCRIPTION, ACTIONS columns
ui_verifications.subscription_badges: ✅ Annuel (green), Mensuel (green), Accès gratuit (green), Aucun (gray), Admin (purple)
ui_verifications.expiration_display: ✅ Shows date with days remaining e.g., '29 mars 2026 (37j)'
ui_verifications.subscription_modal: ✅ Modal opens with user info, 4 action options dropdown, duration/plan selectors
ui_verifications.promos_validity_column: ✅ 'Période de validité' column shows 'Illimité' or date range
ui_verifications.promos_status_badges: ✅ 'Actif', 'Pas encore valide' (orange), 'Expiré' based on validity period
ui_verifications.promo_create_modal: ✅ 'Date de début' and 'Date d'expiration' date picker fields present
